title: 目標達成の後に・あの回のように

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Even in her recent scrimmages, there's been a
clear shift in Kawakami Princess's performance.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: I've got this! Rrraaaagh!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Huff... Huff... Trainer...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Th-thank you... But I'm still overexerting myself.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's true, she ran too hard in the early portion of
the race. It didn't go how we planned, but...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Before, her body would've become stiff just
thinking of the race, and her form would crumble
as a result.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
(But today, she paid close attention to keeping
her movements under control. She's learned how
to use her strength with intent and focus.)
choice_data_list: Your form is steadily improving, too.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Oh! Ehehe... Thank you! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
(She's gotten sufficiently used to racing that she's
no longer straining herself from the get-go. It
might actually be time for...)
choice_data_list: I have something important to discuss.
I have something important to discuss.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Something important?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Simply delicious! Another portion, please, chef!

text_block_list.name: Ramen Chef
text_block_list.text:
You've got gusto, missy. Here, have another
serving of noodles!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
My trainer's picking up the bill today! So I'm
planning to finish off at least five more servings
after this!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Still, I must say, Trainer... When you said
"important discussion," I never imagined we'd
have it at a ramen shop... Hehe.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
This is just like in episode ten of Princess Fighter,
when Legendary Trainer makes an important
confession...
choice_data_list: Exactly. That's why I wanted to talk here.
Exactly. That's why I wanted to talk here.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Huh?
choice_data_list: I want you to enter the Japanese Oaks!
I want you to enter the Japanese Oaks!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Th-th-the Oaks?! The Japanese Oaks?! Are you
serious?!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Whoa, whoawhoawhoawhaa?! But the Japanese
Oaks is a G1 race! And not just any G1 race,
either—it's the peak of the once-in-a-lifetime
Tiara tour!
choice_data_list:
This is the kind of challenge you wanted to take
on, isn't it?

This is the kind of challenge you wanted to take
on, isn't it?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
The Tiara is the princess's crown, obtainable only
from the grandest of stages—the G1 races.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
And I always envisioned myself competing
fiercely in the Tiara tour, awakening my potential
on the field of battle just like Princess Fighter.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
From the very beginning, this has been what she's
dreaming of.
choice_data_list: It's time to let your princess power bloom.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Ehe... Ehehe. Thank you! ♪

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
...And that's what happened, King! Isn't my trainer
amazing?!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Hmm. Well, I can say it was a rather thoughtful
proposition. But aren't you attending a press
conference today?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Press... conference?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: AAAAHHH!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
I t-t-t-totally forgot! And Trainer reminded me so
many times!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Really?! Oh, you airhead! Hurry and get ready!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
I'll help you out, but don't expect me to do
everything. Come now, run!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The press conference is due to start in one
minute. I've tried contacting Kawakami Princess
several times, but she hasn't answered...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Traineeeer! I'm so soooorry!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Wheeze... Wheeze... Did we make it in time?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Right! Let's charge straight in! Charge... charge?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Ch-chaaaarge?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Crash!

text_block_list.name: Moderator
text_block_list.text:
Th-the door... She broke it down with a single
kick...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: D-did I make it?! It's me! Kawakami Princess!

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text:
Pfft... Hahaha! What an unpredictable
Umamusume! Never in my entire life...

text_block_list.name: Reporter B
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha! Tell me about it. I wish I had gotten that
on camera! Imagine the editor's response.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Really?! Then I can do it one more time!

text_block_list.name: Reporters
text_block_list.text: Ahahaha!

text_block_list.name: Moderator
text_block_list.text:
Okay, let's all regain our composure and begin
the racer interviews. First up is...

text_block_list.name: Chestnut-haired Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
Yes. I would first like to express my thanks to you
all for being here today. I've pursued the Tiara
tour this far with the aim of winning the Japanese
Oaks.

text_block_list.name: Chestnut-haired Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
Every bit of effort I've put into this will be
displayed in my results. Thank you.

text_block_list.name: Reporter C
text_block_list.text:
Wow, there's the overwhelming favorite, so
confident and dignified. It's no wonder she's the
most popular contender in the Tiara tour.

text_block_list.name: Moderator
text_block_list.text: Next up, we have...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Y-yes! Is it me?!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Huh... No?! Okay, then, the next racer... please
go ahead!

text_block_list.name: Reporters
text_block_list.text: Pfft...

text_block_list.name: Moderator
text_block_list.text:
Finally, we'll be taking questions from the
audience. Raise your hand if you have something
to ask!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Okay!

text_block_list.name: Moderator
text_block_list.text: Y-yes, Kawakami Princess?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: You, with the yellow and pink striped ear accessory! Is your hair ornament based on Honey Lemon Princess from Sugar Love♪Princess Fighter?!

text_block_list.name: Dark-haired Umamusume
text_block_list.text: M-me?!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Yes! You love Princess Fighter, right?! I'm a huge
fan myself! That's all I wanted to ask!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
choice_data_list: Please move on to the next question.

text_block_list.name: Reporters
text_block_list.text:
Pfft... Ahahaha! You and your trainer make a
unique combo! I'm sure you'll go on to gain many
fans!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Huh? Really?! Th-thank you for saying so!

text_block_list.name: Chestnut-haired Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
Hey, this is a press conference for racers entering
the Japanese Oaks. Don't you think you should
behave more appropriately?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
O-oh... right! My name's Kawakami Princess! My
objective this year is to enter the Japanese Oaks
and...

text_block_list.name: Reporters
text_block_list.text:
Hahaha, we don't need a self-introduction at this
point. Hehe, just relax and answer the questions.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: It's over... It's finally done...
choice_data_list: Let's work on staying calm for next time.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Ughh, you're right... I suppose I'll need to train in
that area too, won't I?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Although she's gotten used to racing, it seems she
still has a lot of room to grow mentally.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
However, if she can learn to remain firm and
composed, she'll improve her consistency in races
too.

text_block_list.name: Reporter D
text_block_list.text: Oh, Kawakami Princess! Do you have a moment?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Yes, what is it?

text_block_list.name: Reporter D
text_block_list.text:
Haha, I just wanted to give you some words of
encouragement. My kids are huge fans of yours.

text_block_list.name: Reporter D
text_block_list.text:
They'll be watching you in the Japanese Oaks
with their friends. So, um, please give it your all!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Ohhhh! Leave it to me!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, I'm going to place first at the Japanese
Oaks! A princess must claim victory!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As if someone flipped a switch, Kawakami
Princess goes from downhearted to full of energy.
She still has a long way to go, but we make a vow
to win the Japanese Oaks.
